calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants McManus Trucking L.L.C. or Robert McManus.
Defaults entered against defendants on April 17, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on April 17, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 2, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants McManus Trucking L.L.C and Robert McManus as follows:

Damages/Principal - $39,618.43.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,790.25.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $410.00, for a total of $44,318.68.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
